text:
śaluṭhattārahārojjvalāṅgīṃ
dhyāyedambhoruhasthāmaruṇimavasanāmīśvarīmīśvarāṇām ॥
I meditate on the Goddess with lotus like hands, who is red
in color, who is Goddess of Lord Shiva, who is drenched in
blood, who is having three eyes , who is of the color of
rising sun, who is pretty with gem studded anklets and who
holds in her hands, the lotus, the rope, the goad and has
the bow and arrows of god of love, who shines with the
garland of gems which are like stars, which is worn over her
large breasts.
lamityādipañca pūjām kuryāt, yathāśakti mūlamantram japet ।
Do the five types of worship with Lam etc. Chant the root
mantra as per your capacity.
laṃ – pṛthivītattvātmikāyai śrī lalitātripurasundarī
parābhaṭṭārikāyai gandhaṃ parikalpayāmi – namaḥ
haṃ – ākāśatattvātmikāyai śrī lalitātripurasundarī
parābhaṭṭārikāyai puṣpaṃ parikalpayāmi – namaḥ
yaṃ – vāyutattvātmikāyai śrī lalitātripurasundarī parābhaṭṭārikāyai
dhūpaṃ parikalpayāmi – namaḥ
32
Aghori.it
